title: ConditionGroupConfiguration
description: The conditions group associated with the transition.

conditionGroups.description: The nested conditions of the condition group.

operation.description: Determines how the conditions in the group are evaluated. Accepts either `ANY` or `ALL`. If `ANY` is used, at least one condition in the group must be true for the group to evaluate to true. If `ALL` is used, all conditions in the group must be true for the group to evaluate to true.
